pages.text: $(l)Spark Swarm$() summons a swarm of combat Sparks that seek out and attack nearby enemies.$(br2)$(l)Max Level:$() 7$(br)$(l)Type:$() Summon$(br)$(l)Botania Mana Cost:$() 40,000 + 15,000/level$(br2)Summons 3-9 homing spark entities (scaling with level) that last 5-13 seconds. The sparks pulse with cyan energy and deal damage on contact.
